pages.text: You beheld his apotheosis, and returned him to the earth in the same breath.

pages.title: The Ascended One
pages.text: The Ascended One in his glory

pages.title: A Man Troubled
pages.text: Marcus, otherwise known as The Ascended One, was the first mage in this chapter to test your skills. An Eldritch mage of noble descent, dreams of grandeur clouded his judgement.$(br2)In his quest to find what was lost to him, he lost himself in his hubris and sorrow.
Staff of Ascension, his main weapon which he may drop
The Black Book, the spellbook he wields which he may drop

pages.title: Torment Mode
pages.text: When the Torment Nexus is worn, returning the Ascended One to the mortal coil sends him in a fury. His attacks increase in aggression and consistency, as well as unlocking new maneuvers.
